title: corneria xanthandra
intro: Corneria xanthandra, also known as Yellow Corneria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Africa and is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties. The leaves and flowers of the Corneria xanthandra plant have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are also used in traditional medicine to promote digestion, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
